_README: HOW TO EDIT: Each entry under 'cases' is one test. Set 'predicted_accuracy_subtype' to what the AI judge answered and 'gold_accuracy_subtype' to the correct answer from the dataset. This evaluator scores 1 when predicted subtype exactly matches gold subtype after lowercasing and trimming whitespace. If predicted subtype is missing/blank, score is always 0. Valid subtypes: none, mistranslation, omission, addition, untranslated, unnecessarily_translated. Use null to simulate a missing value. 'name' is a label shown in test reports.

cases.name: both missing still 0 because predicted is missing
